page_content:
ENGL809 Academic Publishing Worksop (1-2 Credits)

A workshop for the preparation of articles of other critical writing for publication in academic journals or other professional venues. Restriction: Must be in a major within ARHU-English department; and permission of instructor.

Repeatable to: 8 credits if content differs.

Additional Information: Preference will be given to doctoral students beyond coursework.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]
